name: contextforge
description: Desktop AI devtool for preparing software projects for AI agents.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n SERVER,RENDERER,ELECTRON -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 tcp:4000 && cross-env ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron apps/desktop/electron/main.cjs
scripts.build: npm run build -w @contextforge/renderer && npm run build -w @contextforge/server
